assertions.assertion: Identifies MapInboundClaims as the root cause — the JWT bearer handler renames 'sub' to the long Microsoft XML namespace URI
assertions.rationale: Clearly identifies MapInboundClaims as the cause and shows the mapping from 'sub' to the long URI

assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: options.MapInboundClaims = false is shown in the AddJwtBearer configuration

assertions.assertion: Mentions JwtClaimTypes.Subject or the short name 'sub' vs the long http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier URI
assertions.rationale: Both the short 'sub' and long nameidentifier URI are mentioned, plus JwtClaimTypes.Subject

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest the claim is missing from the token itself
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states the claim IS in the token and explains the renaming issue
